subject: Kim Kardashian West and President Trump highlight the power of criminal justice reform
body:
Last December, President Donald J. Trump signed the First Step Act—the first major overhaul of the U.S. criminal justice system in more than a decade. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14ba3cd888&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 13, 2019
---
| | |
# **Kim Kardashian West and President Trump highlight the power of criminal justice reform**

**Last December,** President Donald J. Trump signed the First Step Act—the first major overhaul of the U.S. criminal justice system in more than a decade.

**For too long** , our prison system has failed incarcerated Americans. Oversentencing kept many people behind bars for years after they’d paid their debts to society and were ready to rejoin and reinvest in their communities. Others left prison ill-equipped for employment and life on the outside. As a result, many succumbed to crime and re-imprisonment.
**🎬** **Watch** : [Kim Kardashian West at the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2f9f4d788&e=3ee4985eea)
**In just four months** after President Trump signed the First Step Act, more than 1,000 requests for a reduced sentence were granted. Soon, thousands more who were once subjected to unfair sentencing will get a second chance.

**Today,****the President** discussed the next step in making justice reform a lasting success: empowering Americans to find jobs—and a purpose—after leaving prison. For former inmates, the difficulty of reentering society was often made even tougher because of scarce opportunities for employment. That needs to change.

**“As a result** of the booming economy, we are bringing Americans who have been on the sidelines back into the workforce—including former inmates,” President Trump said.

**The Trump Administration** is taking additional action to encourage U.S. companies to invest in “second chance” hiring. The Department of Labor, for example, will grant $2 million to States this month for bonds that incentivize businesses to hire and train former offenders.

**That opportunity** can begin while inmates are still completing their sentences. For those currently incarcerated, the Department of Education is expanding an initiative to make Pell Grants available for their education and training.

[President Trump is helping all Americans earn a second chance.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7709f000a7&e=3ee4985eea)

**_Washington Examiner_****:** [Criminal justice reform is already working](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc8b864f4f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
|
# **The governors leading the way on getting more Americans hired**** **

**Earlier this year,** the White House asked America’s governors to share their top priorities for 2019. Their answers echoed one of President Trump’s most important agenda items: workforce development for Americans of all stripes.

**This afternoon,** a bipartisan group of governors met with both President Trump and Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump to discuss clearing any obstacles standing in the way of true economic mobility for our workers.

**🎬****President Trump:**[“Tremendous progress” on fulfilling careers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9469f3be4&e=3ee4985eea)

**These governors** have been innovators in tackling that challenge, breaking down barriers such as restrictive occupational licensing, a lack of quality job training, and access to child care in their states. At the table today were Governors Doug Ducey (R-AZ), Brian Kemp (R-GA), David Ige (D-HI), Kim Reynolds (R-IA), Chris Sununu (R-NH), Tom Wolf (D-PA), Bill Lee (R-TN), and Mark Gordon (R-WY).

**“One of the most** rewarding things is to see people coming off the sidelines and back into the workforce,” Ivanka Trump said during today’s discussion. “Whether it’s criminal justice reform, second chance hiring, all the work we’re doing around skills training—employers are getting creative.”

[The Pledge to America’s Workers: 9.8 million opportunities and climbing!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a64accb48&e=3ee4985eea)

| Dear Friend,
Your commitment to this campaign means the world to Heather and me.
Six months ago we started this campaign for governor and we haven't stopped since. We've shook hands, spoke to packed rooms, debated and asked voters to honor us with their vote.
But we can't stop now with less than 2 months to go in this election.
After last week's debate, there is no doubt our momentum is stronger than ever. This momentum we are seeing is because of people like you - and the fact that I am giving Mississippians an alternative to another career politician.
That is why I am reaching out to you first.
You see, these next two months are critical to our campaign and it is important we continue to keep our momentum going, as the request for yard signs are more than we have on hand.
Please help us spread the word and momentum by [making a donation today towards our 48 hour fundraising goal.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QpAM0_idwiO1IuegtTgcNE0jc5d4iu51D8YIOXCoxb8il6YizFFkI6fyDfzpSQjhQrXrV6TksC2-cRmWKjAwgm6N3Drr3H52aR1c22mGWThO_jfaeM1TymVdnnpsbkVCP-JULM07iwumiCsG-JlsNoTa00awFKuurGZtNFlctK9xLZB4WZPVBG6Da1g29IIM6nJJZJE6Xj7tI5L1H3RAjOMK1sqfPmHK&c=d0e3VP1sH3ziaBj9mp5-fNkAba54lc10gXkaXs_xKDtQGrVEObd_4A==&ch=pNOyC2l5YXlkj0e52yxoQGruuWaZFDxZxqFRhpK7JR6E-PJ7_W9PgA==)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: We can answer John Oliver’s question . . . It’s Virginia!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
| | Good afternoon Peter, Long before I ever decided to run for office, I watched the example of advocacy set by my mother. She dedicated her entire career to helping others as a nurse, and as she transitioned into retirement, she became focused on the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) in Virginia. Even though the ERA passed in the US House and Senate with flying colors back in 1972, not enough states took the final step to ratify it. Advocates like my mother believed that Virginia could be among the states to change it, so for years, they've gone to our state Capitol, lobbied members of our state legislature, and heard excuse after excuse. Year after year their numbers have grown, but each year, the ERA dies in committee. In Congress, we recently had the first Congressional hearing on the ERA in 36 years. This is what happens when you make a substantial change to the composition of our legislative bodies; we need to do the same in Virginia! So why the John Oliver reference? Because he just aired an [amazing piece](https://act.myngp.com/el/IF2Cs5VxXBJwyIRN6rrNNjmAa4b_U1DeibTl_DhSauQ=/-FMx4RO0fMimPFN4I9yf5oArMwffrdTTJ__sQDuyg9E=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.14_b1_as_all) on the ERA. In it, he reminds us that there is just ONE state left to ratify, and he challenges the remaining states to take action. He asked which will be the final state to ratify the ERA. . . . . . I know it can be Virginia. Can you help ensure that happens? All we need to do is win a few more seats this November! It's possible with your help. We flipped 15 Delegate seats in 2017 and three Congressional seats in 2018, including mine. But even with such huge strides, the ERA still hasn't made it out of committee in our current General Assembly. We need your help to finish the job and put the ERA on the path to ratification! **[Please consider supporting the Virginia House and Senate Democratic Caucuses as they support candidates across Virginia who are making this issue of basic constitutional equality a pillar of their candidacies](https://act.myngp.com/el/IF2Cs5VxXBJwyIRN6rrNNjmAa4b_U1DeibTl_DhSauQ=/zF6KH4UJPRrxiVZSQQTQ4bkQm2aJpJO5gv3ghNcsTYs=).** Thank you for your continued support, Abigail

---
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. clean_body: | | Good afternoon Peter, Long before I ever decided to run for office, I watched the example of advocacy set by my mother. She dedicated her entire career to helping others as a nurse, and as she transitioned into retirement, she became focused on the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) in Virginia. Even though the ERA passed in the US House and Senate with flying colors back in 1972, not enough states took the final step to ratify it. Advocates like my mother believed that Virginia could be among the states to change it, so for years, they've gone to our state Capitol, lobbied members of our state legislature, and heard excuse after excuse. Year after year their numbers have grown, but each year, the ERA dies in committee. In Congress, we recently had the first Congressional hearing on the ERA in 36 years. This is what happens when you make a substantial change to the composition of our legislative bodies; we need to do the same in Virginia! So why the John Oliver reference? Because he just aired an on the ERA. In it, he reminds us that there is just ONE state left to ratify, and he challenges the remaining states to take action. He asked which will be the final state to ratify the ERA. . . . . . I know it can be Virginia. Can you help ensure that happens? All we need to do is win a few more seats this November! It's possible with your help. We flipped 15 Delegate seats in 2017 and three Congressional seats in 2018, including mine. But even with such huge strides, the ERA still hasn't made it out of committee in our current General Assembly. We need your help to finish the job and put the ERA on the path to ratification! =. Thank you for your continued support, Abigail | Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Press Room: Dean Browning for Congress
subject: Republican Dean Browning Rolls Out Early Endorsements for 2020 Congressional Race in PA-7
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BROWNING FOR CONGRESS
body:
Conservative businessman and proud Trump Republican says incumbent Rep. Susan Wild is far too liberal for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District
---
| | | | | |
---
| Republican Dean Browning Rolls Out Early Endorsements for 2020 Congressional Race in PA-7
---
| Conservative businessman and proud Trump Republican says incumbent Rep. Susan Wild is far too liberal for Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District
---
| For Immediate Release Contact: Dean Browning (484-550-6550)
Allentown, Friday, June 14, 2019 - Conservative businessman and Trump Republican Dean Browning rolled out an impressive list of early endorsements today, just shy of a year before the 2020 primary in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District.
In 2018, Browning's insurgent, grassroots campaign fell short by less than one percentage point against Marty Nothstein in the Republican primary.
"I am honored to receive the early endorsements of so many trusted conservative leaders across the 7th Congressional District in support of my campaign to make Susan Wild a one-term Congresswoman," said Browning. "During her first 6+ months in office, Rep. Susan Wild has proven herself far too liberal to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress. We must make sure that she faces a strong challenge when she seeks re-election in 2020. My pro-Trump, pro-2nd Amendment and pro-life candidacy offers the clear and compelling contrast Republicans need against Susan Wild and the increasingly socialist Democrat Party in Washington."
Dean Browning's Announced Endorsements
Justin Simmons, State Representative Glenn Eckhart, Lehigh County Controller Nate Brown, Lehigh County Commissioner Matt Dietz, Northampton County Councilman Brent Labenberg, Emmaus Borough Councilman David Bond, South Whitehall Township Commissioner Phyllis Andrews, Bath Borough Councilwoman Robert Smith, Allentown School Board Director Sean Gill, Upper Macungie Township Supervisor William Heydt, Former Allentown Mayor Roger Reis, Former Lehigh County Commissioner Andy Roman, Former Lehigh County Commissioner Hayden Phillips, Former Northampton County Councilman Pat Breslin, Former Bethlehem Township Commissioner Lou Hershman, Former Allentown City Councilman Scott Armstrong, Former Allentown School Board Director Tom Campione, Past President, Lehigh Valley Tea Party Ronnie DelBacco, Past President, Lehigh Valley Tea Party

In 2018, Browning's insurgent, grassroots campaign fell short by less than one percentage point against Marty Nothstein in the Republican primary. "I am honored to receive the early endorsements of so many trusted conservative leaders across the 7th Congressional District in support of my campaign to make Susan Wild a one-term Congresswoman," said Browning. "During her first 6+ months in office, Rep. Susan Wild has proven herself far too liberal to represent the Lehigh Valley in Congress. We must make sure that she faces a strong challenge when she seeks re-election in 2020. My pro-Trump, pro-2nd Amendment and pro-life candidacy offers the clear and compelling contrast Republicans need against Susan Wild and the increasingly socialist Democrat Party in Washington." subject: Kim Kardashian West Returns to White House for Prisoner Reentry Event
body:
"These people want to work. They want the best outcome," Kardashian West said. "I'm so happy to announce today..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5cc045d499&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Kim Kardashian West Returns to White House for Prisoner Reentry Event**

“Kim Kardashian West, who was a driving force behind the commutation of Alice Johnson, returned to the White House to speak at an event promoting the hiring of prisoners released early under the First Step Act, the criminal justice reform law President Trump signed into law in December,” CBS reports.

“These people want to work. They want the best outcome,” Kardashian West said. “I'm so happy to announce today that we have a ride-share partnership where formerly incarcerated people will be gifted gift cards so that they can get rides to and from job [interviews], to and from jobs, family members.”

She then thanked President Trump for his “compassion” and dedication to criminal justice reform during the past year.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57fddc42d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “When President Trump took office, small businesses and hard-working, middle-class families were finding it increasingly difficult to afford health insurance,” writes Brian Blase, special assistant to the president at the National Economic Council, in [CNN Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f425526b5&e=3ee4985eea). “A new Trump administration rule will provide an estimated 800,000 businesses a better way to offer coverage and millions of workers a better way to obtain coverage, through the expansion of Health Reimbursement Arrangements (HRAs).”
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s detractors are trying to play down the significance of the U.S.-Mexico immigration deal, saying it is largely comprised of actions that Mexico had already agreed to many months ago. Nice try,” American Enterprise Institute Resident Fellow Marc Thiessen writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90d5508012&e=3ee4985eea). “If Mexico had truly agreed to implement many of these measures in December, then why had they not been implemented six months later? As even Mexican officials acknowledge, it was Trump’s threat of tariffs that forced Mexico’s hand.”
---
|
---
| “While many immigrants who come here illegally are simply looking for better lives for themselves and their families, the consequences for legal citizens are often deleterious. Illegal immigration has a devastating impact on low-wage workers whose employers give them their jobs,” [_The Boston Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ad3e89958f&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “Elected leaders must do more to dissuade foreigners from coming to the United States illegally and persuade them to enter legally. They must also support law enforcement in border security efforts and stop incentivizing illegal immigration with the prospect of amnesty.”
---
|
---
| “Secretary of State Mike Pompeo on Thursday charged Iran with responsibility for the attack earlier in the day on two oil tankers in the Gulf of Oman,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3ea9b7b36&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. “The unavoidable fact is that Iran remains the primary threat to stability in the Middle East. The U.S. is right to be there, in force and prepared to defend the interests of itself and its allies.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a2015cd32&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9cb3362c7b&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4f85d8d9e1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Voter suppression is an existential crisis for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6cf/34a064cc/687cc3d/703ef5a/3728079375/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/")

| | | Friend - We know that elections are changed when new people come into the process, when we increase the participation of the most marginalized members of society. So when bad actors deliberately suppress participation in an election, that is a dangerous step towards autocracy. Across our country, we see politicians whose sense of power is tied to their ability to win at all costs, even if that cost is undermining the very entity they want to lead. We have to have leaders who understand that the global good of liberal democracy benefits us all. As a country, we have always used the power of the vote to build the type of government we want. Voting is about your ability to choose who represents you and who speaks for you, to choose the values that guide our country, our state, and our community. The value system we see reflected in our government will determine our ability to address the most pressing problems of our time: jobs, health care, climate change, poverty, gun violence. These issues affect our global community. If we can triumph over voter suppression, then we can create a more robust conversation for how we solve the problems of our time. As Americans, our charge is to create the change our communities need and deserve through the ballot box. But we can only do that if we ensure free and fair elections for every eligible voter. [**Will you make a contribution to Fair Fight today to help us get there?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa6cf/34a064cc/687cc3d/703ef5b/3728079375/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfightga2018-2?refcode=IE061419SYA") Thank you,
Stacey Abrams

name: Zach Graumann, Yang2020
subject: OFFICIAL: Yang In the Debates (Details Inside)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| | Friend --
[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=1)[](http://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=2) _On behalf of Chair Perez, I am pleased to inform you that you have been certified to participate in the first Democratic presidential primary debate, which will take place on June 26 and 27 in Miami, FL._ It's official - Andrew Yang will be on the debate stage in Miami! It never would have happened without each of you, so thank you so much for your support. Because of you, Andrew will be making the case for the Freedom Dividend on the debate stage, focusing the country on data-driven solutions to the biggest problems we're facing. We know you have many questions: What night will it be? Who will be on the stage with Andrew? What can you do to watch? Who won the giveaway? Will he stand next to Joe Biden? We've got you covered. **Basic Information:** Date: Thursday, June 27th Time: 9-11pm EDT Location: Adrienne Arsht Center for the Performing Arts, 1300 Biscayne Blvd, Miami, FL Airing On: NBC, MSNBC, Telemundo Other candidates: Sanders, Harris, Biden, Buttigieg, Bennet, Williamson, Swalwell, Gillibrand, Hickenlooper. This is definitely the debate everyone will be watching! **How to Watch:** The DNC has partnered with certain channels and online outlets to provide everyone with a chance to watch. It will air live on NBC, MSNBC, and Telemundo, and stream online (we'll send details closer to the date). But why watch it alone when you can watch it with fellow supporters? [We want all of our Yang Gangs to set up watch parties here to show the country the strength of this movement](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=RDcZDUOB5xo0RLGZuMRMKuy71yI4-Z4eON-umtEeArH_3msHF4NGsd8yi6qz_9wk&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=3 "MobilizeAmerica link for Andrew
Yang")! Our goal is two watch parties per state and we are so confident you all will knock this goal out of the park. If you have any questions about setting up an event, please reach out to our Volunteer Coordinator, Shaun Looney, at shaun@yang2020.com. **Who's the Lucky Giveaway Winner?** The winner will be contacted shortly! Look for an announcement next week. **Will He Stand Next to Joe Biden?** We've done the math. Odds currently stand at 20%. **How Can I Help Get Him Into the Later Debates?** The criteria for the second round of debates is 2% in at least 4 polls between June 28th and August 28th, and 130,000 individual donors, with at least 400 in 20 different states. We have officially hit the 400 in 20 different states! We're also at 121k individual donors. That's close enough that we feel pretty comfortable we'll hit the 130k well ahead of the deadline, but it would be great to head into the debates at the end of the month with that qualification in the bag. [**If you haven't donated, please make a donation of even just $1 today! Let's get those last 9k donors before June 27th.**](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcOeLHcr_ZoyjmBbfdAE_htA3NMKjWKgbEQ19_kNpni9T_zZKIHjJ_7ivr3WfGwkVdZWmH49tiD1rMlJAFa5Itnh-DiQpGK9qxb6E2hKkSCD-lg0SvLk8aiMKQKLf_RcWYaPnTkTjrlm_-nNBn9R-9EPQ&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=4 "ActBlue Page for Andrew Yang") For the polls criteria, we've hit 2% a few times, but we don't want to take anything for granted. Help us spread the word!
* [Set up a watch party, or attend one and bring a friend](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=RDcZDUOB5xo0RLGZuMRMKuy71yI4-Z4eON-umtEeArH_3msHF4NGsd8yi6qz_9wk&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=5 "MobilizeAmerica Page for Andrew Yang").
* [Purchase a Volunteer Starter Kit and talk with potential supporters on the street](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=OJW7B7dIawl8qH5Qk_BYPdZOD3rcdyLajlHu8vwhEMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=6 "Andrew Yang Merch Store").
* [Buy a MATH hat or Andrew Yang shirt and wear it around town](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=OJW7B7dIawl8qH5Qk_BYPdZOD3rcdyLajlHu8vwhEMw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=7 "Andrew Yang's Merch Shop").

See you June 27th, Yang Gang. America has no idea what’s about to hit it. Zach Graumann Campaign Manager, Yang2020

[ DONATE $50](https://my.yang2020.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGztwOurmyDQdaH3NaKLwEpcO18xGzef5TvO42JaBQed0jaBNWLsD3frblJj2FiCYkZw&e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=10)

**Can you make a donation today?**

Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us invest in people.

**Join the Yang Gang!**

If you'd like to volunteer to help with grassroots organizing, please fill out an organizer application [here](https://my.yang2020.com/?e=d12a2bba9049b8d4852b6e0020f599b5&utm_source=yang2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=061419_1debates_2&n=11) and someone from our team will reach out.

body:
Tomorrow’s the big day. No, it’s not Election Day. Tomorrow is our big municipal training seminar, “Battleground Indiana:... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/winning-starts-with-you?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| **_Winning Starts With You_**
Tomorrow’s the big day. No, it’s not Election Day. Tomorrow is our big municipal training seminar, [“Battleground Indiana: Winning Indiana’s Cities & Towns,”](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7b9582eb37&e=1acd9bb3d6) and I couldn’t possibly be more excited if tomorrow really were Election Day.

Why am I so excited? Because winning starts with you. It starts with our local teams – Indiana’s Republican mayors, mayoral candidates and campaign teams – building the skills needed to fundraise, build a message and successfully share it with voters. And that’s exactly what we have planned for tomorrow when we’re bringing everyone together with a clear focus – winning elections and serving Hoosiers.

Tomorrow’s event is focused completely around our candidates and staffers – current and future – and how we can help them build the skills that win elections. Through six one-hour breakout sessions, we’ll have trainings including “Communications & Messaging,” “Identifying Your Target Voters,” “Write Your Campaign Plan,” “Grassroots & the Ground Game,” “Campaign Finance & Fundraising,” and more. We have a lunch panel discussion with several of Indiana’s current Republican mayors, and then we’ll wrap up the day with a reception with **Governor Eric Holcomb** , celebrating our fantastic 2019 candidates.

You can check out the full schedule of events [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbec196fda&e=1acd9bb3d6).

I hope we’ll see you there. Republicans currently hold the majority of Indiana’s mayors offices, and maintaining (and expanding!) that majority starts with you.

-Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was **
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_Governor Eric Holcomb:
Telling Indiana’s Story & Protecting Indiana’s Children_** For **Governor Eric Holcomb** , this was another week focused around Hoosiers – telling our state’s story and protecting our most vulnerable children.

**Governor Holcomb** was in our nation’s capital for the SelectUSA Investment Summit, which showcases the best of the United States to top international companies and investors (which you know centers on Indiana!). While at the summit, he had an opportunity to speak on a panel highlighting Indiana’s leadership in advanced manufacturing, and met with U.S. Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross and top companies considering bringing great new jobs to the state.

Check out [more photos on Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=350ee0071c&e=1acd9bb3d6) of his work promoting Indiana!

Returning to Indiana, **Governor Holcomb** ceremonially signed several bills, including two bills that will make a difference in the lives of Hoosier children and families. These bills focus on:
* Keeping children in need in the most family-like setting
* Providing greater support for foster case families
* Extending the age older foster youth can receive collaborative care services
* Updating the Department of Child Services (DCS) caseload to align with best practices
* Extending the deadline for DCS to send assessment updates to allow for more complete reporting
* Amending the DCS response time to two hours
* Amending the definition of neglect to exclude poverty as the sole justification.

Read more about these bills, the progress at DCS and how Governor Holcomb is committed to protecting Hoosier children [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fd31f169e4&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Congresswoman Susan Brooks Announces Retirement from Congress_** Today, **Congresswoman Susan Brooks** announced that she will retire from the U.S. House of Representatives at the end of her term and not seek a fifth term in Congress.

**Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer** released a statement thanking**Congresswoman Brooks** for her service:

_"**Congresswoman Susan Brooks'** career is defined by service. Her astute focus on issues facing Hoosiers has led her constituents to reelect her by big margins time & again, including by 14 points in 2018.

"Thanks to the work of **Congresswoman Brooks **and the leaders who came before her, the results of decades of Republican leadership in the 5th District will keep this seat solidly in Republican hands.

"Even after she's retired, I'm confident that Hoosiers will long be feeling the impact left by **Congresswoman Susan Brooks.** "_

Read the full statement [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a85aca219d&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
---
| **_President Trump Showcases the Greatest Spectacle in Racing_** The Greatest Spectacle in Racing was front and center again this week, as **President Donald Trump** welcomed Indy 500 winner Simon Pagenaud and Team Penske to the White House.

Check out these fun photos of **President Trump** celebrating the Indianapolis 500! **Governor Holcomb** was even on hand, and named Simon Pagenaud an honorary Hoosier!

These bills focus on: Keeping children in need in the most family-like setting Providing greater support for foster case families Extending the age older foster youth can receive collaborative care services Updating the Department of Child Services (DCS) caseload to align with best practices Extending the deadline for DCS to send assessment updates to allow for more complete reporting Amending the DCS response time to two hours Amending the definition of neglect to exclude poverty as the sole justification. Read more about these bills, the progress at DCS and how Governor Holcomb is committed to protecting Hoosier children . | | | | Congresswoman Susan Brooks Announces Retirement from Congress Today, Congresswoman Susan Brooks announced that she will retire from the U.S. House of Representatives at the end of her term and not seek a fifth term in Congress. Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer released a statement thankingCongresswoman Brooks for her service: "Congresswoman Susan Brooks' career is defined by service. Her astute focus on issues facing Hoosiers has led her constituents to reelect her by big margins time & again, including by 14 points in 2018. "Thanks to the work of Congresswoman Brooks and the leaders who came before her, the results of decades of Republican leadership in the 5th District will keep this seat solidly in Republican hands. "Even after she's retired, I'm confident that Hoosiers will long be feeling the impact left by Congresswoman Susan Brooks. " Read the full statement ! | | | | President Trump Showcases the Greatest Spectacle in Racing The Greatest Spectacle in Racing was front and center again this week, as President Donald Trump welcomed Indy 500 winner Simon Pagenaud and Team Penske to the White House. Check out these fun photos of President Trump celebrating the Indianapolis 500! Governor Holcomb was even on hand, and named Simon Pagenaud an honorary Hoosier! | | | Applications Now Open: **Apply for the Lugar Series Are you a woman interested in expanding your civic engagement? Are you looking for an opportunity to make an impact in your community and build your leadership skills? The Richard G. Lugar Excellence in Public Service Series, now in its 30th year, was created for you! Applications are now available for the 2019-2020 class. Learn more about the program , and download the application – which is due on August 1. | | Upcoming Republican Events : Boone County Annual GOP Golf Scramble : Take Me Out to the Ballgame **Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at mailto:info@indiana.gomailto:info@indiana.go! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. subject: On the March...
body:
** Good afternoon Peter,
------------------------------------------------------------

This past weekend we attended the Fontaine & Scenic Woods Juneteenth Parade. It was our pleasure and joy to be able to participate in such a stimulating and invigorating event.

Tomorrow, we will be marching in Mayor Turner's Annual Juneteenth Parade, and we look forward to sharing our message, meeting members of our community, and celebrating freedom and sovereignty for all.

Be sure to join us this Saturday at 10 AM at the Acres Homes Multi-Service Center (6719 W. Montgomery)! (https://www.houstontx.gov/health/MSC/acreshomesmsc.htm?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3fb59e616-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3fb59e616-32267927)

Join us! (https://www.houstontx.gov/specialevents/juneteenth.html?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3fb59e616-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3fb59e616-32267927)

Our efforts have been valiant, and they've paid off. As we attend more local meetings and reach out to various community leaders, we are finding that more and more people know who we are, and are interested to hear what we have to say.

I couldn't be more proud of the progress we've made, but we still have a long way to go. We are coming up on the end of the first financial quarter of the campaign, and we need to make a substantial push to get to where we need to be. Be sure to donate (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3fb59e616-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3fb59e616-32267927) today; your contributions make all the difference.

Donate! (http://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=b3fb59e616-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-b3fb59e616-32267927)
Thanks for your effort and support thus far!

Best wishes,

Marc Flores

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: Fighting for Montana unions and working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
**[PETITION: Stand with Montana's unions and support the PICKET Act.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164714/1e3760f0/69b48f64/5f7eb53a/2999442147/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-montana-workers?source=em190614&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Friend,
This is not a campaign about me--this campaign is about all Montanans.
Electricians in Butte. Teachers in Bozeman. Nurses in Billings. Firefighters in Helena. Carpenters in Great Falls. This campaign is about working families in Missoula and Ravalli County and the hardworking men and women all across this great state from Kalispell to Miles City and everywhere in between.
As Montanans, we know the value of a hard day's work. And all Montana workers deserve to be represented by someone who shares those values and will stand up for them against special interests in Washington, D.C. As your next Senator, I will fight for working people every day.
As a proud MFPE union member I stand with my union brothers and sisters and will walk picket lines with them. As Montana's next United States Senator I will fight for unions every day.
**[Today, I am proud to announce my support for the PICKET Act, Senator Jon Tester's legislation that supports Montana workers and families. Add your name if you're with me.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164714/1e3760f0/69b48f64/5f7eb53a/2999442147/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-montana-workers?source=em190614&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
We must never allow what happened at the lockout of Montana workers in Three Forks last summer to ever happen again. We must never allow a foreign-owned corporation--or any corporation--to lock out workers in a shameless attempt to break the union and slash benefits.
Together, we can and will work harder to implement basic labor standards for employees. We can make sure enormous corporations are not gaming our system to benefit shareholders and CEOs rather than the workers that are trying to make ends meet and provide for their families.
Together, we will protect a worker's right to collectively bargain for better wages and working conditions, as well as fight to end misclassifying employees as independent contractors.
And we must fight to hold multinational corporations accountable who don't care about workers. We must fight the forces of division and greed who look to break up our American unions.
**[We must stand with working people in Montana and across the nation. We can start by calling on the Senate to pass the PICKET Act. Sign on now to show your support.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/56164714/1e3760f0/69b48f64/5f7eb53a/2999442147/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stand-with-montana-workers?source=em190614&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=")**
Thank you,
Wilmot

clean_body: "=" Friend, This is not a campaign about me--this campaign is about all Montanans. Electricians in Butte. Teachers in Bozeman. Nurses in Billings. Firefighters in Helena. Carpenters in Great Falls. This campaign is about working families in Missoula and Ravalli County and the hardworking men and women all across this great state from Kalispell to Miles City and everywhere in between. As Montanans, we know the value of a hard day's work. And all Montana workers deserve to be represented by someone who shares those values and will stand up for them against special interests in Washington, D.C. As your next Senator, I will fight for working people every day. As a proud MFPE union member I stand with my union brothers and sisters and will walk picket lines with them. As Montana's next United States Senator I will fight for unions every day. "=" We must never allow what happened at the lockout of Montana workers in Three Forks last summer to ever happen again. We must never allow a foreign-owned corporation--or any corporation--to lock out workers in a shameless attempt to break the union and slash benefits. Together, we can and will work harder to implement basic labor standards for employees. We can make sure enormous corporations are not gaming our system to benefit shareholders and CEOs rather than the workers that are trying to make ends meet and provide for their families. Together, we will protect a worker's right to collectively bargain for better wages and working conditions, as well as fight to end misclassifying employees as independent contractors. And we must fight to hold multinational corporations accountable who don't care about workers. We must fight the forces of division and greed who look to break up our American unions. "=" Thank you, Wilmot "=" * Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

name: Tim Ryan
subject: See you in Miami, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
**I have great news:**the DNC announced that I officially qualified for the first Democratic debate on June 26th!****** **

This was only possible because of dedicated supporters like you, team. I will do everything in my power to make you proud -- whether it's on the debate stage, the campaign trail, or in the White House. The road ahead is still long but with you by my side, I've no doubt that we will change the course of our future. Last night, I talked with Trevor Noah on the Daily Show about the issues driving our campaign and my vision for America. Pushing for higher wages and pensions, ensuring quality access to health care, investing in education -- the bread and butter issues that really matter to American families. These are the issues that power our campaign.
[](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9fc7/5486deaa/21dfcfa2/dc9e0eb/2783755282/VEsH/ "http://www.cc.com/video-clips/ha21f6/the-daily-show-with-trevor-noah-tim-ryan---running-for-president-and-fighting-for-forgotten-communities---extended-interview?xrs=synd_twitter_061419_tds_79&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2")
Photo credit to @ruminasean on Twitter, @imseangallagher on Instagram
**Together, I know we can tackle these challenges and build the nation we deserve so that America can thrive. I am so proud to have your support as we move forward.**

Thank you for being with us. I couldn't have done it without you -- and I wouldn't want to, either.

In solidarity,

Tim

P.S. My team insists that I let you know that we are on the road talking to voters in the early states and still in need of support to keep up our momentum.

**[We have a travel fund](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY&amount=&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+We+have+a+travel+fund&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2")** set up which goes directly to making sure we can connect with voters so that we can bring the voices of real, everyday Americans to the debate stage with us. If you want to help out, **[you can donate here](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-travelfund?refcode=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY&amount=&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+you+can+donate+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2").**

Tim needs to prove he has the support of 65,000 individuals from over 20 states.
Help him take his vision for our future to the mainstage by [**contributing right now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9fc7/5486deaa/21dfcfa2/dc9e0ec/2783755282/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+contributing+right+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_30DO_190614_DAILY_T2")

---
| | **EXPERTS REVEAL TRUMP ADMIN TRIGGERING SOARING HEALTH CARE COSTS** **[President Trump 's war on health care is a national crisis. So I just endorsed Medicare for All to stop him. I need 5,000 fellow Democrats to sign on and condemn Trump for sabotaging our health care before midnight. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b545/18e32a7f/58b102d6/7baba909/1977642447/VEsH/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/health-care-survey?source=20190614_em_pet_b1_mavbrl_all_rs")** | I'm absolutely furious.

Experts just revealed President Trump's war on the Affordable Care Act is directly causing costs to skyrocket -- **so I just endorsed Medicare for All to stop him.** [_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 5,000 fellow Democrats to sign their name and take an immediate stand against Trump. Will you add your name and take a stand against Trump 's reckless war on our health care? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b545/18e32a7f/58b102d6/7baba909/1977642447/VEsE/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/health-care-survey?source=20190614_em_pet_b1_mavbrl_all_rs") ****NAME: ****dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b545/18e32a7f/58b102d6/7baba909/1977642447/VEsF/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/health-care-survey?source=20190614_em_pet_b1_mavbrl_all_rs")**
---

I'm furious.

Donald Trump's war on Obamacare is causing our health care costs to skyrocket -- **and the experts just confirmed it.**

[_**So I just endorsed Medicare for All to stop him. I need 5,000 Democrats to sign their name alongside mine before midnight and condemn Trump for sabotaging our health system. >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b545/18e32a7f/58b102d6/7baba909/1977642447/VEsC/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/health-care-survey?source=20190614_em_pet_b1_mavbrl_all_rs")

I've spoken to parents who can't afford to send their kids to an annual check-up.

To grandmothers forced to forego prescription medication in lieu of rent.

To young couples who are one emergency room visit away from bankruptcy.

| | Yesterday, Julian wowed attendees and viewers alike in a town hall interview with FOX News in Tempe, Arizona. **Both Democrats and Republicans in attendance applauded his answers **on hot button issues like immigration, abortion rights, policing reform, and holding President Trump accountable, **on a network known for its conservative bias. ** When he launched his campaign, **Juli an pledged to be a candidate and president for everyone**, not just those who agree with him. He proved last night that his vision for our country's future--one where every American can live up to their potential--appeals to voters across the ideological spectrum. So what are voters saying about Secretary Castro's town hall? Take a look: [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdf4/3eb3e2fc/42216ea3/744939ca/2435192431/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/aaronibarralv13/status/1139304352865083392?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20190614_em_fnth-recap&source=20190614_em_fnth-recap") He talked about his [People First Policing plan](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcdf4/3eb3e2fc/42216ea3/744939c9/2435192431/VEsF/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com/news-events/people-first-policing?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+People+First+Policing+plan&utm_campaign=20190614_em_fnth-recap&source=20190614_em_fnth-recap"), and the countless lives lost in incidents with police officers. Julian had the opportunity to share his vision with FOX News viewers last night, and it was a huge success. **We couldn't be where we are without all of your help.** Heading into the June and July debates, we're counting on your continued support to grow this campaign. body:
Hey there, I wanted to reach out and introduce myself -- my name is Dave
Huynh, and I’m a Senior Advisor on Kamala’s campaign for president. My
specialty is working with delegates and doing the math to get our campaign
to a victory in this crowded Democratic primary. That’s why everyone calls
me “Delegate Dave!”

I had the chance to witness history today: representatives from each
presidential campaign gathered in New York to watch a random drawing of
competitors for the first Democratic debate.

Let’s make sure that when Kamala takes the stage, our grassroots movement
is at full strength. Our campaign isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs
or special interests. Just people. Can you pitch in today?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

subject: important update here for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Friend, Debbie is hard at work in both D.C. and Florida. Take a look below at the latest happenings, and please follow the campaign on **[Facebook](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b95/2241528209/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/RepDebbieWassermanSchultz/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")** and **[Twitter.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b94/2241528209/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/DWStweets?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")**

**Begin forwarded message**

> Friend,
>
> Summer is already underway, and things in D.C. and Florida are moving full steam ahead (pun intended.) Debbie wanted to make sure you're up to date on what your support is making possible.
>
> [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b97/2241528209/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/RepDebbieWassermanSchultz/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")
> Last week, the House passed the Dream and Promise Act, which provides a pathway to citizenship for DREAMers, Temporary Protected Status recipients, and Deferred Enforced Departure recipients. This is a major step towards ensuring immigrants are treated with the dignity they deserve.
>
> [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b96/2241528209/VEsC/ "https://www.facebook.com/RepDebbieWassermanSchultz/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")
> Debbie is fighting to stop the abuse immigrants are experiencing, including children who are being held in disturbing conditions in Florida. She and her colleagues Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Donna Shalala are calling on the Trump administration to shut down a facility that has been described as "prison-like" where unaccompanied migrant youth are being held, and instead connect the kids with sponsors or be placed in non-restrictive community-based residential facilities.
>
> The Trump administration recently took the needlessly cruel step of cancelling recreational programs, legal aid, and English classes at facilities for unaccompanied youth, deeming them "not necessary." This is yet another example of the inhumanity of this administration, and Debbie is committed to continue fighting these policies.
>
> [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b89/2241528209/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/RepDebbieWassermanSchultz/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")
> Debbie is also working to bring relief to Florida and other areas affected by natural disasters. After months of unnecessary delays of critical disaster aid legislation by Republicans, a disaster relief bill was finally passed and signed by the president. As we begin this year's hurricane season, Debbie will keep up the fight to ensure our communities have the disaster relief funding they need.
>
> If you haven't yet, please follow Debbie on Facebook and Twitter to stay up to date.
>
> **[Like us on Facebook](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b88/2241528209/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/RepDebbieWassermanSchultz/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=6+-+Like+us+on+Facebook&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")**
> **[Follow @DWStweets](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113d9d/622b7b5b/1fe97d42/307b3b8b/2241528209/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/DWStweets?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=7+-+Follow+DWStweets&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2&source=DWS_EM_EN_30DO_190614_1_2")**
> Thank you so much for your continued support of our campaign, team. Debbie couldn't do the work she does without you.
>
> More soon,
>
> Team DWS
---

subject: Debate Lineups + Stakeholder Call this Tuesday
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/b8673aa0aa62/debate-lineups-stakeholder-call-this-tuesday?e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Friends,

We’re incredibly excited that the first Democratic presidential primary debate is less than two weeks away, and you may have seen that NBC announced the lineups earlier today (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2020-election/nbc-announces-lineup-democrats-each-two-nights-first-2020-debate-n1017676?cid=sm_npd_nn_tw_ma&utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=c69fca1acd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_10_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-c69fca1acd-238537933) We’re committed to ensuring that all of our candidates have a fair and equal opportunity to share their message with voters, and we’re thrilled to be hosting the debate over two nights, with 10 candidates taking the stage each night in Miami.

We also know that there have been some questions during this process. We want to make sure we are as transparent as possible and equipping you with answers to the questions you may get from supporters, friends, and family. We will be hosting a call this Tuesday at 2:30 PM ET//11:30 AM PT with members of our leadership team to brief you on the debate process and answer any questions you may have. Please RSVP for Tuesday’s call to receive a dial-in (https://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/XGR7RVQG66TT0EY8?utm_source=DNC+Community+Engagement&utm_campaign=c69fca1acd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_06_14_10_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_acfdb5d126-c69fca1acd-238537933) .

As always, thank you for all the work you do to better our country. We look forward to taking back the White House alongside you and electing Democrats up and down the ticket!

In Solidarity,

Muthoni Wambu Kraal
National Political &Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

name: Team Bernie
subject: Hosts needed in 22123
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
We have a date for Bernie’s debate!

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk)
Friends -
The DNC just announced: Bernie will be debating on June 27!
We want to use the first Democratic debate to [**host thousands of Debate Watch Parties**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/debate-watch-party-host-signup/?source=em190614-dwp-host-60&t=2&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk), where supporters like you open up their homes (or another place in your community) to other Bernie supporters.
**So we have a pretty big ask for you: will you host a debate watch party?**
[SIGN UP TO HOST](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/debate-watch-party-host-signup/?source=em190614-dwp-host-60&t=3&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk)
Hosting a debate watch party is a fun way to engage Bernie supporters in your area, and also help new people hear Bernie’s message.
You’ll also be doing something incredibly important in the process – recruiting new volunteers for Bernie in your community.
Once you sign up, you’ll be able to set a limit for the number of guests who can RSVP, choose whether to list your event as public or private, and email your guests telling them what to bring. And if you can host your debate party in Spanish, please do! You can note that as well when you set it up.
You’ll also receive a guide with all of the information you’ll need to make your event a success. And if you host a Spanish-language event, we'll send you translated materials too.
[**Help make the first debate a huge night for Bernie! Sign up to host a debate watch party now.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/debate-watch-party-host-signup/?source=em190614-dwp-host-60&t=4&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk)
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
* * *
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/15267?refcode=em190614-dwp-host-60&t=5&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=1703_150750_36UoHk&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=9&akid=1703%2E150750%2E36UoHk).
